detectors.description:
Reentrancy in OptimismInu._transfer(address,address,uint256) (OptimismInu.sol#441-505):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (OptimismInu.sol#487)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (OptimismInu.sol#519-531)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (OptimismInu.sol#493)
		- _feeAddrWallet.transfer(amount) (OptimismInu.sol#569)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (OptimismInu.sol#503)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (OptimismInu.sol#657)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (OptimismInu.sol#637)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (OptimismInu.sol#639)
	OptimismInu._rOwned (OptimismInu.sol#241) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- OptimismInu._takeTeam(uint256) (OptimismInu.sol#651-659)
	- OptimismInu._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (OptimismInu.sol#633-647)
	- OptimismInu.balanceOf(address) (OptimismInu.sol#359-363)
	- OptimismInu.constructor() (OptimismInu.sol#309-323)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (OptimismInu.sol#503)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (OptimismInu.sol#665)
	OptimismInu._rTotal (OptimismInu.sol#257) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- OptimismInu._getCurrentSupply() (OptimismInu.sol#757-767)
	- OptimismInu._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (OptimismInu.sol#663-669)
	- OptimismInu.constructor() (OptimismInu.sol#309-323)
	- OptimismInu.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (OptimismInu.sol#415-423)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [OptimismInu._transfer(address,address,uint256)](OptimismInu.sol#L441-L505):
	External calls:
	- [swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance)](OptimismInu.sol#L487)
		- [uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp)](OptimismInu.sol#L519-L531)
	External calls sending eth:
	- [sendETHToFee(address(this).balance)](OptimismInu.sol#L493)
		- [_feeAddrWallet.transfer(amount)](OptimismInu.sol#L569)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount)](OptimismInu.sol#L503)
		- [_rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam)](OptimismInu.sol#L657)
		- [_rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount)](OptimismInu.sol#L637)
		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](OptimismInu.sol#L639)
	[OptimismInu._rOwned](OptimismInu.sol#L241) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [OptimismInu._takeTeam(uint256)](OptimismInu.sol#L651-L659)
	- [OptimismInu._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](OptimismInu.sol#L633-L647)
	- [OptimismInu.balanceOf(address)](OptimismInu.sol#L359-L363)
	- [OptimismInu.constructor()](OptimismInu.sol#L309-L323)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount)](OptimismInu.sol#L503)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](OptimismInu.sol#L665)
	[OptimismInu._rTotal](OptimismInu.sol#L257) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [OptimismInu._getCurrentSupply()](OptimismInu.sol#L757-L767)
	- [OptimismInu._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](OptimismInu.sol#L663-L669)
	- [OptimismInu.constructor()](OptimismInu.sol#L309-L323)
	- [OptimismInu.tokenFromReflection(uint256)](OptimismInu.sol#L415-L423)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in OptimismInu.openTrading() (OptimismInu.sol#575-601):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (OptimismInu.sol#585)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (OptimismInu.sol#587)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (OptimismInu.sol#587)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (OptimismInu.sol#597)
	OptimismInu.tradingOpen (OptimismInu.sol#283) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- OptimismInu.openTrading() (OptimismInu.sol#575-601)
